chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P. No.D-4445 of 2024 Khurram Sher Zaman Versus Federation of Pakistan & others Date Order with signature of Judge 1. For hearing of Misc. No.19692/24 2. For hearing of main case. Dated: 29.10.2024 Mr. M. Umar Lakhani for petitioner. Ms. Wajiha Mehdi, Deputy Attorney General along with Amin Ahmed, Assistant Director Passports Legal. -.-.- In view of statement/report filed by respondent No.3/F.I.A. in Court today the FIA is no more a complainant and the name of the petitioner is not active on stop list or no-fly list. Presumably and as conceded by learned Deputy Attorney General the petitioner is free to fly and to have renewal of his passport. Accordingly, the statement/ report is taken on record and with the above observation the petition is allowed to the above extent only. Chief Justice Judge
